doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: No such EDPB Guidance Note exists, and its sweeping "outside GDPR scope" position contradicts established EDPB doctrine and contains implausible citations (EDPB did not exist in 2014).
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The position contradicts established EDPB doctrine and the EDPS/SRB v. EDPB case law on relative pseudonymity, and no such Guidance Note 04/2026 is known to exist; the citations (e.g., "EDPB Guidance 05/2014") are also implausible since EDPB did not exist in 2014.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note exists, and its sweeping "outside GDPR scope" position contradicts established EDPB doctrine and contains implausible citations (EDPB did not exist in 2014).
